response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-00:07: Intro/Title scene. 2. 00:07-04:30: Identified the song 'Silent Flame, Never Fade' performed by Shiranui Flare based on on-screen text and search results. Lyrics found online. 3. 04:30-end: Outro announcement.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a 3D performance of the song 'Silent Flame, Never Fade' by VTuber Shiranui Flare, followed by an outro announcement.

scenes.description: Shiranui Flare performs the song 'Silent Flame, Never Fade' on a 3D stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
静かに揺れ続ける焔(ほのお)
名もなき道照らし出す
失くしていた未来さえ
いまあなたと新たな明日を刻んだ

いくつもの夜を超えて
紡いできた 自分らしさ
選択したその全てが
私をまた突き動かす

強がってた訳じゃなくて
止まることが怖かったよ
迷っていたあの日もきっと
今のチカラになってるよ

一人きりだと思っても
気づけばそこにある笑顔が
私といつも一緒に歩いてくれてた
その意味 そのチカラ 絶対に離さない！

加速していくこの想いは
いま翼を纏い出す
私が私でいれる
それだけで十分だから

逃げないって決めたのは
強くなったからじゃない
私を呼ぶその声と
重ね合った 信じる世界の明日を

傷つくこと 躊躇ってた
立ち止まったこともあった
そんな時に この背中を
押してくれたその眼差し

迷いながら選んだ道
間違いさえ真実だと
その焔は闇を照らして
私に正しさをくれた

張り裂けそうに痛んでも
この胸に刻んだ勇気が
私をいつも支えてくれていたから
今ここに感じ合う
あなたと私の夢

燃え尽きることの無い夢は
この大空に羽ばたいて
涙さえも輝かせ
誰かの夜を照らしたい

逃げないって決めたのは
強くなったからじゃない
静かな焔(ほのお)を抱いて
何度だって立ち上がれること知ったから

たとえ世界が色を失くし
光が遠ざかっても
この名に刻む焔(ほむら)は
あなたと私を繋いで

逃げないって決めたのは
強くなったからじゃない
私を呼ぶその声と
重ね合った 信じる世界の明日を
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The quiet flame continues to flicker
Lighting up the nameless path
Even the future I had lost
I have now carved a new tomorrow with you

Crossing over many nights
I have spun my own way of being
Everything I have chosen
Moves me forward once again

It is not that I was acting tough
I was just afraid to stop
Even those days I was lost
I am sure have become the strength I have now

Even when I think I am all alone
If I notice, the smiles are there
You have always walked together with me
I will never let go of that meaning, that strength!

This desire that is accelerating
Is now starting to wear wings
Just being able to be myself
Is enough

The reason I decided not to run away
Is not because I became strong
With that voice that calls me
We overlap the tomorrow of the world we believe in

I was hesitant to get hurt
There were times I stood still
At such times, you pushed my back
That look in your eyes

The path I chose while lost
Even the mistakes are the truth
That flame lights up the darkness
And gave me righteousness

Even if it hurts until it tears apart
This courage carved in my chest
Has always supported me
Now we feel it here together
Your and my dream

The dream that never burns out
Flaps its wings in this great sky
Making even tears shine
I want to light up someone's night

The reason I decided not to run away
Is not because I became strong
Embracing the quiet flame
I learned that I can get back up no matter how many times

Even if the world loses its color
And the light moves far away
The flame carved into this name
Will connect you and me

The reason I decided not to run away
Is not because I became strong
With that voice that calls me
We overlap the tomorrow of the world we believe in
